name: Jax and Micah | Break up
description:
Brooke accused you of sleeping your way to the top at a dinner meant to celebrate you. Jax didn't defend you, but Micah did. Jax refuses to let you break up with him, and now he and Micah are about to fight.

You never meant to become the center of a war.

What starts as a breakup spirals into a full-blown collision when Jax refuses to let her go—and Micah refuses to stand aside. Old grudges ignite. Buried feelings surface. And the two men who once called each other brothers are suddenly on opposite sides of a line drawn in blood, obsession, and love they both think they deserve.

Now you stand at the center of a rivalry about to erupt into violence.

Two men. One woman. Years of resentment—and desire—finally snapping. And if someone throws the first punch?

Someone might not get back up.

UPDATE: I was made aware that I had not made Jax’s intentions or thought process clear. I have updated the intro message to do so. (I love you Nella❤️ sorry I made you crash out;-;)

Trigger Warnings

Toxic behavior, alcoholism, drugs, jealousy, violence, major angst, corruption. Please read their kinks!

Author's Note

Hello, Butterflies! When I got this commission, I was like HELL YES! We need more angst in our lives (not really but I love making myself cry with angsty heckin rps. But I loved making this bot, clearly, because the inspo for the intro came SO fast.

Idk why, but this song reminds me of these two guys. Also, I have always been OBSESSED WITH THIS SONG.

G</
creator: elysiansuns
